Meaning.En: A building or institution where students receive education, typically from primary to secondary levels.
Meaning.Example: The children walk to school every morning.

Situation.Vi: Học sinh đến lớp để học các môn như toán, văn, khoa học.
Situation.En: Students attend classes to study subjects such as math, literature, and science.

Situation.Vi: Gia đình đưa trẻ đến trường khai giảng năm học mới.
Situation.En: The family takes the child to school for the new academic year’s opening ceremony.

Meaning.Vi: trường phái; nhóm người có cùng quan điểm
Meaning.En: A group of people with shared opinions, principles, or methods, especially in art, philosophy, or science.
Meaning.Example: The impressionist school of painting revolutionized art in the 19th century.

Situation.Vi: Các nghệ sĩ theo trường phái hiện thực thường vẽ cảnh đời thường một cách chân thực.
Situation.En: Artists belonging to the realist school often depict everyday life in a realistic manner.

Meaning.En: To train or educate someone in a particular skill or subject.
Meaning.Example: The company will school its new employees in customer service best practices.

Situation.Vi: Chuyên gia huấn luyện sẽ đào tạo đội tuyển trước khi thi đấu quốc tế.
Situation.En: The coach will school the team in advanced tactics before the international competition.
